title: Local SEO GBP Audit Starter
allowed_inputs: Business name, public website, Google Business Profile URL if available, target city/service area, and 1-3 priority services. Do not send account credentials.
paid_deliverable: One local SEO / GBP audit covering profile completeness, category fit, review/citation gaps, landing-page fit, and a prioritized next-action checklist.
acceptance_gate: Buyer confirms the business URL/profile, target market, fixed scope, delivery format, and a $175 payment route before custom analysis starts.
proof_rule: Count $0 unless a real buyer accepts scope, pays through a user-controlled route, receives delivery, and payment is posted/released/payable/cleared.
money_counting_rule: Release downloads count $0. Count only externally posted, released, payable, or cleared payment after buyer acceptance and delivery.

title: PDF Table Extraction Starter

paid_deliverable: Extracted CSV from the approved PDF/table sample, notes on ambiguous rows, and a repeatable extraction checklist.
acceptance_gate: Buyer confirms file rights, table scope, output columns, deadline, and a $125 payment route before extraction starts.
proof_rule: Count $0 unless a real buyer accepts scope, pays through a user-controlled route, receives delivery, and payment is posted/released/payable/cleared.
money_counting_rule: Release downloads count $0. Count only externally posted, released, payable, or cleared payment after buyer acceptance and delivery.
